name: Accessibility Features Persistence (Sticky Keys)
description: Detects replacement of accessibility executables for persistence and privilege escalation
query:
// Detect replacement of accessibility features binaries
// Trigger on writes to sethc, utilman, narrator, osk, magnify
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)\\system32\\(sethc|utilman|narrator|osk|magnify|DisplaySwitch|AtBroker)\.exe"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
